name: The Kita-Nippon Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Kita-Nippon Bank, Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides commercial banking products and services in Japan. The company accepts various deposits; and offers business, housing, and other loans. It also provides credit cards; and credit guarantee, leasing and financing, computer, software development, and software sale services. As of March 31, 2020, the company had 77 offices in Iwate Prefecture. The Kita-Nippon Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1942 and is headquartered in Morioka, Japan.
